scenes.description: Chorus performance with Baelz and Mumei.
Verse 1, first Baelz solo then Mumei solo.
Verse 2, Mumei solo then Baelz solo.

subtitles.original: ありがとう 君がいてくれて 本当よかったよ
subtitles.english: Thank you, I'm really glad you were here.

subtitles.original: どんな時だって いつも笑っていられる
subtitles.english: No matter the time, I can always keep smiling.

subtitles.original: 例えば 離れていても 何年経っても
subtitles.english: Even if we're apart, even if years pass,

subtitles.original: ずっと変わらないでしょ
subtitles.english: It'll stay the same forever, right?

subtitles.original: 私たち Best Friend 好きだよ
subtitles.english: We're best friends, I love you.

subtitles.original: 大好きだよ
subtitles.english: I love you so much.

subtitles.original: こんな遅い時間にゴメンね
subtitles.english: Sorry for the late hour.

subtitles.original: 一人じゃせっぱ詰まってきたの
subtitles.english: Being alone, I felt cornered.

subtitles.original: 君の声 少し聞いたらがんばれる
subtitles.english: If I hear your voice just a bit, I can do my best.

subtitles.original: なんでも打ち明けられる ママにも言えないことも全部
subtitles.english: I can tell you anything, even things I can't tell my mom.

subtitles.original: 誰よりもわかってくれる
subtitles.english: You understand me better than anyone.

subtitles.original: 嬉しいときには 自分の事みたいに喜んでくれて
subtitles.english: When I'm happy, you're glad for me as if it were yourself.

subtitles.original: ダメな時はちゃんと叱ってくれる存在
subtitles.english: When I'm down, you're the one who scolds me properly.

subtitles.original: へこんでる時は真っ先にメールくれる優しさに もう何度も救われて
subtitles.english: When I'm depressed, your kindness in emailing me first has saved me many times.

subtitles.original: 泣きたい時は思いっきり泣けばいい
subtitles.english: When I want to cry, you say 'It's okay to cry your heart out,

subtitles.original: 「そばにいるから」って
subtitles.english: because I'm here for you'.

subtitles.original: 何かあったらすぐに飛んでくから 絶対
subtitles.english: If anything happens, I'll definitely fly to you right away.
